tabla_hash.label: hash table
tabla_hash.desc: associates data values with key values - a lookup table

notacion_o.label: big O notation
notacion_o.desc: form of Landau notation representing asymptotically equivalent or slower growth

busqueda_binaria.label: binary search algorithm
busqueda_binaria.desc: search algorithm in sorted lists that operates by decreasing the search space by half each pass

ordenacion_mezcla.label: merge sort
ordenacion_mezcla.desc: worst-case optimal stable divide and conquer comparison sorting algorithm

bfs.label: breadth-first search
bfs.desc: algorithm for searching the nodes of a graph in order by their hop count from a starting node

dfs.label: depth-first search
dfs.desc: algorithm for traversing or searching tree or graph data structures

excepcion.label: exception handling
excepcion.desc: process of responding to anomalous or exceptional conditions requiring special processing in computer programming

funcion_lambda.label: anonymous function
funcion_lambda.desc: function definition that is not bound to an identifier

diccionario.label: associative array
diccionario.desc: data type that associates keys with values

complejidad.label: time complexity
complejidad.desc: estimate of time taken for running an algorithm

regex.label: regular expression
regex.desc: sequence of characters that forms a search pattern

gil.label: global interpreter lock
gil.desc: coarse-grained mutex used in some process virtual machines

comprension_listas.label: list comprehension
comprension_listas.desc: computer language construct for declaratively defining lists (or other data structures)

recursion.label: recursion
recursion.desc: algorithmic technique in computer science of solving a problem by reducing it to a smaller instance of the same problem

lista.label: list
lista.desc: abstract data type used in computer science

clase.label: class
clase.desc: in object-oriented programming, a definition that specifies how an object works

conjunto.label: set
conjunto.desc: abstract data type in computer science

grafo_estr.label: graph data structure
grafo_estr.desc: abstract data type in computer science

closure.label: closure
closure.desc: technique for creating lexically scoped first class functions

generador.label: generator
generador.desc: special routine that can be used to control the iteration behaviour of a loopː looks like an array function, behaves like an iterator

iterador.label: iterator
iterador.desc: in computing, an object whose methods enables a program to orderly traverse elements having some logical conditions in a given container from a given first element

polimorfismo.label: polymorphism
polimorfismo.desc: in programming languages and type theory, accessing different types using a common interface

decorador.label: decorator
decorador.desc: expression that can be attached to a declaration
